label_presence_explanations.AMBIGUOUS_INCORRECT: No incorrect candidate in the current feature table fell inside 0.1 < SE <= 0.5, so the gray-zone label is absent instead of being force-filled.

notes: Rows are keyed by candidate_id. Prompt-level Semantic Entropy is broadcast to both paired candidates by prompt_id.
Archived diagnostic operational labels combine annotation-backed is_correct with fixed Semantic Entropy thresholds; thesis-valid analyses use annotation-backed correctness plus corpus-axis bins.
The trainable features object excludes label-only and gold/reference leakage fields; label metadata stays outside features.
